name: sidecar
description: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.
comment_commands: INTENTIONALLY EMPTY (not a mistake). `commands: []` replaces the default `commands/` directory scan with an empty list, so this plugin does NOT register namespaced `/sidecar:<cmd>` slash commands. Slash commands are exposed instead as BARE `/<cmd>` user-scope delegators generated by `sidecar shadow` into ~/.claude/commands/. Without this, every command would appear TWICE in the picker (`/fleet` shadow + `/sidecar:fleet` plugin). The plugin still ships the commands/ files (they are the source `sidecar shadow` mirrors from) — they are just not loaded as plugin commands.
